name: Mississippi Mud Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 140°C. Place the rack in the lower half of the oven.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Heat the coffee, Bourbon whiskey, dark chocolate, and butter until melted. Stir in the sugar until it has also melted.
4. Allow the mixture to cool for about 5-10 minutes.
5. Add the sifted dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) to the cooled mixture while stirring gently.
6. Add the eggs and vanilla sugar.
7. Pour the batter into a greased and sugar-sprinkled baking pan.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for about 1 1/2 hours or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Garnish with whipped cream and dark chocolate before serving.
